description: Common security controls required by cyber insurance underwriters, mapped to M365 assessment checks

CI.MFA.1.title: MFA for all remote access
CI.MFA.1.question: Is multi-factor authentication enabled for all remote access to the network and cloud services?
CI.MFA.1.evidence: MFA enrollment percentage, CA policies requiring MFA
CI.MFA.1.typical_impact: Policy denial or significant premium increase if MFA is not enforced

CI.MFA.2.title: MFA for privileged accounts
CI.MFA.2.question: Is MFA enforced for all accounts with administrative privileges?
CI.MFA.2.evidence: Admin MFA status, PIM configuration, CA policies targeting admin roles

CI.MFA.3.title: MFA for email access
CI.MFA.3.question: Is MFA required for all email access including mobile devices?
CI.MFA.3.evidence: CA policies for Exchange Online, ActiveSync policies, mobile device management

CI.PAM.1.title: Privileged access management
CI.PAM.1.question: Are privileged accounts managed with just-in-time access and monitored?
CI.PAM.1.evidence: PIM eligibility vs permanent assignments, Global Admin count, break-glass procedures

CI.EDR.1.title: Endpoint detection and response
CI.EDR.1.question: Is EDR deployed on all endpoints with 24/7 monitoring?
CI.EDR.1.evidence: Defender for Endpoint deployment coverage, onboarding status, alert response SLAs

CI.PATCH.1.title: Patch management
CI.PATCH.1.question: Is there a formal patch management process with critical patches applied within 14 days?
CI.PATCH.1.evidence: Windows Update compliance, update ring configuration, patch compliance percentage

CI.EMAIL.1.title: Email security
CI.EMAIL.1.question: Are email filtering and anti-phishing protections in place?
CI.EMAIL.1.evidence: Defender for Office 365 policies, anti-phishing, safe links, safe attachments

CI.BACKUP.1.title: Data backup
CI.BACKUP.1.question: Are backups performed regularly, tested, and stored offline or immutably?
CI.BACKUP.1.evidence: Manual attestation required — M365 native backup is limited

CI.LEGACY.1.title: Legacy authentication disabled
CI.LEGACY.1.question: Are legacy authentication protocols (POP3, IMAP, SMTP Auth) disabled?
CI.LEGACY.1.evidence: CA policy blocking legacy auth, authentication methods policy

CI.STALE.1.title: Account lifecycle management
CI.STALE.1.question: Is there a process to disable accounts within 24 hours of employee departure?
CI.STALE.1.evidence: Stale account count, offboarding automation, access reviews

CI.TRAIN.1.title: Security awareness training
CI.TRAIN.1.question: Do all employees complete security awareness training at least annually?
CI.TRAIN.1.evidence: Manual attestation — check Attack Simulation Training in Defender

CI.IR.1.title: Incident response plan
CI.IR.1.question: Is there a documented and tested incident response plan?
CI.IR.1.evidence: Identity Protection policies, automated response actions, alert playbooks

scoring.method: Required controls met / total required controls × 100
scoring.note: Most underwriters require 100% on MFA and PAM controls for policy binding
